title: Saudi Arabian Lamb Tagine
description: A flavorful and aromatic Japanese-inspired lamb tagine dish, incorporating traditional Saudi Arabian spices and tender lamb.
instructions: Heat oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Sear lamb until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes. Remove and set aside.
Add onion and garlic to pot, cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add savory, tender, saudi, and arabian to pot, cook for 1 minute.
Add lamb back to pot, and pour in 2 cups of water.
Bring to a boil, then reduce heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2 hours, or until lamb is tender.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs, if desired.
